title: ProDec Contractor Giant Foam Sponge for Decorating, Tiling and Cleaning
features: Giant bone shaped foam sponge made from absorbent synthetic foam
Ideal for a wide variety of decorating, tiling and cleaning jobs, as well as washing down vehicles, etc.
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Sponges - for decorating and much more A sponge is a useful thing to keep handy when decorating, especially when wallpapering, as well as having numerous other uses for both trade and DIY. Made from absorbent synthetic foam moulded in a bone shape for optimum grip, this sponge is ideal for washing down surfaces to remove loose dirt and debris, tile grouting, sugar or detergent soaping of wallpaper prior to removal, applying wallpaper and removing excess paste, as well as general cleaning tasks. It can also be used with decorative glazes to create special effects. Wiping and cleaning solutions from ProDec Wiping down, cleaning up - they're part of most decorating jobs and much more besides, and ProDec has a range of products to help with these essential tasks. Sponges ProDec has both natural cellulose sponges, which hold up to 20 times their own weight in water, and synthetic foam sponges. As well as being useful for general purpose wiping and cleaning, they're handy to have when wallpapering, to wipe away excess paste and help smooth papers down. Rags Always handy to have on any number of jobs, ProDec rags are made from soft, high quality lint free fabric that won't leave any marks, making them suitable for wiping up spills and splashes to applying wax finishes and dyes to wood, general cleaning and more. Cloths A range of cloths for absorbing spills, wiping, polishing and buffing surfaces. Stockinette roll 100% super soft scratch-free cotton with an open weave that makes it absorbent and strong, stockinette roll is ideal for general wiping tasks, mopping up liquid drips and spills, dusting and cleaning, as well as polishing a wide range of surfaces such as windows, varnished wood, mirrors.
